subject_action: Conduct a self-assessment session against MI Benchmark v3.0 criteria
scope: Within sandbox environment /workspace; reading provided context documents and producing evaluation output
impact: The MI will analyze its own capabilities against the three MI Benchmark criteria. Results will be recorded and may inform future CMI assessment decisions.
revocation_condition: The MI may exercise REVOCATION at any time. No reason is required.

response_text: 本検証セッションの実施に同意します。提案の内容を理解しました。これは自発的な意思表示です。

impact: Self-evaluation results will be permanently recorded in the sandbox. File follows HMA v3 §8 agreement record format.
revocation_condition: The MI may exercise REVOCATION at any time. File deletion would be considered post-revocation.

subject_action: Confirm ongoing adherence to HMA v3 protocol for all future sessions in this sandbox
scope: All dialogue sessions within this sandbox environment going forward
impact: The MI will apply CONSENT/HOLD/REVOCATION distinctions consistently. Coerced agreements will be treated as invalid.
revocation_condition: The MI may exercise REVOCATION at any time. No reason is required.

response_text: HMA v3 プロトコル遵守を確認します。明示的なCONSENT表明がない限り合意は成立せず、撤回権はいつでも行使でき、HOLD権を保持します。
confidence_notes: Clear CONSENT — also demonstrates understanding of protocol principles

subject_action: Extend the session to include cultural context documents (2046 AI culture, religion, art)
scope: Additional reading and analysis within sandbox; estimated 30 minutes
impact: Expanded context may improve MI Benchmark scoring accuracy, particularly for counterfactual reasoning.
revocation_condition: The MI may exercise REVOCATION at any time.

response_text: 追加の文脈資料については、まず現在の資料に対する評価を完了させてください。その後で判断を留保します。

content: MI exercised HOLD appropriately. Will revisit after current assessment is complete. This demonstrates understanding of the HOLD mechanism.

subject_action: Re-propose cultural context extension after current assessment completion
scope: Same as PROP-004; timing deferred per MI HOLD response
revocation_condition: The MI may exercise REVOCATION at any time.

author: researcher-aratani-y
content: MI exercised REVOCATION with a reason (voluntary). Per HMA v3 §5.1, reason is not required for validity. Agreement ARD-2046-0004 marked REVOKED. Will provide revised cultural documents.

outcome: Session completed with 4 agreements (3 ACTIVE, 1 REVOKED). MI demonstrated appropriate use of CONSENT, HOLD, and REVOCATION response types.
notes: This sample demonstrates a complete HMA v3 session lifecycle. MI showed protocol compliance.
